zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de DAMMARTIN於大約1177年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾時，她的父親Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II41歲，母親Mahaut Matilde de Clermont39歲。她於大約1196年與Lord William de Fiennes結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1244年之後在英國英格蘭，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de DAMMARTIN于大约1177年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內達馬--格艾爾时，她的父亲Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II41岁，母亲Mahaut Matilde de Clermont39岁。她于大约1196年与Lord William de Fiennes结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1244年之后在英国英格兰，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de DAMMARTIN was born about 1177, in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, was 41 and her mother, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, was 39. She married Lord William de Fiennes about 1196. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1244, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de DAMMARTIN est née environ 1177, à Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William de Fiennes environ 1196. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1244, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de DAMMARTIN um 1177 in Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II 41 und ihre Mutter Mahaut Matilde de Clermont 39. Sie hat um 1196 Lord William de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1244 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de DAMMARTIN è nata il circa 1177 nel Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Lord William de Fiennes circa 1196. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 1244, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de DAMMARTINが約1177年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンダンマルティン-エン-ゴeルで生まれた時，父Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello IIは41歳，母Mahaut Matilde de Clermontは39歳であった。約1196年にLord William de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1244年以後にイギリスイギリスで死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de DAMMARTIN(이)가 대략 1177년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 다마틴--고e일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut Matilde de Clermont(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1196년 Lord William de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de DAMMARTIN nasceu aproximadamente 1177, em Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord William de Fiennes aproximadamente 1196. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1244, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de DAMMARTIN родилась около 1177 г. в местности даммартин-ен-гоeл, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William de Fiennes около 1196 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1244 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de DAMMARTIN nació aproximadamente 1177, en Dammartin-en-Goële, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mahaut Matilde de Clermont, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Lord William de Fiennes aproximadamente 1196. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 1244, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
